should_trigger: Use X.com, papers, GitHub repos, and authoritative blogs to build a beginner tutorial on retrieval augmented generation, with diagrams for every chapter and PDF/Word/HTML exports.
I will give you any topic. Research theory, practice, cases, and code examples, then create a textbook-style tutorial for beginners.
Create a Chinese beginner guide to AI agents with source citations, an outline first, visual HTML diagrams per chapter, textbook-style headings, and final docx/pdf/html files.
把这个主题做成5000到1万字的高审美教程，要求每章有清晰配图，章节标题采用第1章和1.1这种格式，HTML有固定锚文本目录，并导出Word和PDF。
我给你一批资料、链接和参考项目，你以这些资料为核心，再补充必要的论文、GitHub和权威资料，生成一套教程输出物。
不要限制字数，把这个概念系统讲透，让新手能真正学会，并且每章都要有独立质检和配图。
should_not_trigger: Convert this finished markdown file to a PDF.
Design a standalone interactive diagram page with no tutorial text.
Write an SEO blog post about AI agents without source research.
near_neighbor: Build a personalized study guide from a learner profile.
Research this topic and summarize links only.
Create a PowerPoint deck from this tutorial.
